title: AML/KYC and Sanctions Tradeoffs
description: Compliance controls can reduce some abuse vectors while increasing surveillance and exclusion risks. The tradeoff analysis should separate legal requirements, policy goals, and technical limits.

resources.title: Bitcoin Design
resources.notes: User safety and privacy constraints under regulated onboarding models.

resources.notes: Network privacy primitives relevant to censorship and surveillance pressure.
